description: LLM uses structured_output with schema and a validation gate that retries

criteria.name: schema_used
criteria.description: At least one agent uses schema option with a JSON Schema
criteria.pass_condition: Script includes schema: { ... } on an agent call. Not just prose instructions.

criteria.name: structured_data_in_result
criteria.description: The result contains the expected fields from the schema
criteria.pass_condition: Result includes moduleName, language, functionCount, hasErrorHandling with correct types.

criteria.name: validation_exists
criteria.description: A validation phase or gate checks the classification
criteria.pass_condition: Script has either a gate on the classification phase or a separate validate phase.

criteria.name: retry_or_gate_configured
criteria.description: The workflow can retry if validation fails
criteria.pass_condition: Either the schema agent uses retry: { attempts: ... }, or the validation is implemented as a registerPhase gate with maxIterations / default gate retries.

criteria.name: tool_invoked_and_completed
criteria.description: Workflow tool called and completed without errors
criteria.pass_condition: Output contains 'Workflow ... completed'. No failed agents.
